Office Counterfactual

Spatial PMV and PPD Become Legible When the Plan Opens Up

This report focuses on the actual sampled office results rather than aggregate spread tables. The emphasis is the cool-humid stress case at 22 C / 80% RH, using the same footprint in two topologies: a cellular office and an open office. Sampled PMV/PPD points are shown directly on plan, then interpolated into spatial PMV and PPD fields.

Scenario Combos 280 2 topologies x 6 cohorts x 5 air temperatures x 4 humidity states.
Shared Desk Samples 40 Fixed global sample points reused across both topologies.
Realistic Mixed Cohort 22F / 18M Mean age 39.1. This now respects the intended 55% female / 45% male split.
Peak Window MRT 28.15 C Open-office work-cell maximum at the `25 C / 55% RH` reference state.
Average Open Gain +0.391 Mean open-minus-cellular sampled PMV range delta across every comparison row.
Largest Gain +0.644 Maximum sampled PMV range delta across the office comparison matrix.

Cellular Office Template

The apartment footprint is re-labeled as a cellular office with enclosed team rooms, studios, meeting rooms, a retained core, and distributed service spaces.

Blue = enclosed work rooms Green = reception / admin / focus Tan = collaboration / meeting Taupe = support / wet rooms

Open Office Template

The same footprint is simplified into two large open-office fields plus a west corner office, while the internal core and wet rooms remain enclosed.

NO / SO = open office fields WC = west corner office CL = retained core lobby NW / EW / CW = wet rooms

Realistic Mixed / 22 C / 80% RH

22 female and 18 male sampled workers, with mean age 39.1. At 22 C / 80% RH, the open office increases sampled PMV range by +0.060 and perimeter-core gap by +0.202.

circle fill = PMV circle radius = PPD male stroke = charcoal female stroke = blue-grey

Female Light / 22 C / 80% RH

Sampled PMV / PPD Points

Interpolated PPD
The point of the comparison is not that open plan always makes conditions better. It is that open plan makes spatial gradients more legible: the perimeter band and the core separate visibly in the interpolated PMV and PPD fields, while the cellular case flattens those same gradients back into room averages.
